publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Organizational records, printed material, and correspondence.
did.abstract: Secretary's and treasurer's reports, minutes of the executive board and various committees and annual meetings, constitutions, lists of officers, newsletters and brochures, samples of printed forms, reports of activity groups, social reports, newcomers' items, history of the Campus Club, and miscellaneous items.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Cornell women's organization, formed in 1900 to "welcome newcomers to the campus and to promote friendship among the women at Cornell."

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Secretary's and treasurer's reports, minutes of the executive board and various committees and annual meetings, constitutions, lists of officers, newsletters and brochures, samples of printed forms, reports of activity groups (1936-1941), social reports, newcomers' items (1949-1953), history of the Campus Club, and miscellaneous items. Includes correspondence of Mary H. Donlon, Emily Day, and Helen A. Newman. Also includes a VHS videotape made by the Quilting Group of the Campus Club in 1995 of the presentation of a quilt to Frank and Rosa Rhodes.

emph.ref: Series I. Cornell Campus Club Annual Reports
Series II. Assorted Campus Club Records

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell Campus Club Records, #11-8-390. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Women -- New York (State) -- Ithaca -- Societies and clubs.

did.unittitle: Cornell Campus Club Executive Board Notebook
Campus Club Chorus Music Library Inventory
Bequest of Joan Gallagher estate to Campus Club; Last Will and Testament of Joan Gallagher
Photos, newspaper clipping, detailed membership listing

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ithaca Times March 26, 2025; Campus Club at Cornell 125th Anniversary Booklet; Printout of slide show given at the Jan 11, 2025 Anniversary Winter Social; 125th Anniversary Invitation; 2 Photos from the 125th Anniversary Celebration.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence related to donations from the Bird Study Group, such as gift letter and Thank You notes.

did.unittitle: Bird Study Group - Correspondence and Misc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos of members 1998, e-mail discussion of membership rules, an obituary of Margaret Lasley Shepherd.

did.unittitle: Bird Study Group - Historical Birding Summaries

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Schedules - time and place of Bird Study Group field trips; Winter Programs 2009-2012
